title: Child safety: small hazards, big harm
body: "The Office for Product Safety and Standards (OPSS) is leading a fresh campaign to raise awareness among parents and carers about the potential dangers to children from swallowing small objects, particularly magnets and button batteries.  OPSS has produced resources that can be used by local authorities, consumer bodies, community groups and the public to help protect children, including posters and social media materials.  Small hazards, big harm: button batteries  Leaflet    Button batteries leaflet A5 print  (PDF, 2.88 MB, 4 pages)  Button batteries leaflet A5 web  (PDF, 1.72 MB, 4 pages)  Button batteries leaflet A5 print Welsh  (PDF, 1.74 MB, 4 pages)  Button batteries leaflet A5 web Welsh  (PDF, 2.08 MB, 4 pages)   Posters  These posters first shared in May 2025 feature 5 top tips to keep children safe and were developed through collaboration with accident prevention charities, clinicians, manufacturers, online marketplaces and trade associations.
